question.text: The RTA inter-operable platform provides which of the following services to investors?

answer.text: Only viewing of portfolio holdings and NAV information
Only filing complaints and tracking their resolution
Purchase, redemption, switch transactions; service requests; queries and complaints; investment reports; capital gains statements; and unclaimed dividend details
Only purchase and redemption of mutual fund units

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The RTA inter-operable platform provides comprehensive services including: financial transactions (purchase, redemption, switch), service requests, queries and complaints, investment reports, capital gains statements, and unclaimed dividend details. It is a full-service digital platform. **The Trap:** The platform is not limited to just transactions or just viewing. It covers the full spectrum of investor services across multiple AMCs. **Cross-Exam Context:** MF Central is the practical implementation of this inter-operable concept. It bridges both RTAs to provide unified services. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Encourage tech-savvy clients to use the inter-operable platform for consolidated reporting. It saves time compared to checking individual AMC websites and gives a complete portfolio view including capital gains for tax filing.
